基础⑩·喜好与活动,我喜欢做...,Practice like/enjoy/hate + doing and want/need/hope + to do.,练习动名词和不定式的用法。,35,L1~L2,掌握like+doing(动名词)和want+to do(不定式)的区分。,动名词 不定式 like doing want to do,"## 动名词 (Gerund): 动词+ing 变名词
- like + doing: I like swimming. (我喜欢游泳这件事)
- enjoy + doing: She enjoys cooking. (她享受做饭)
- hate + doing: I hate waiting. (我讨厌等待)
## 接动名词的常用动词
## 关键规则
- like/love/hate/prefer 后可接 doing 或 to do，意思基本相同
- enjoy/mind/avoid/practice 后**只能接 doing**",practice_foundation-integrated-express_喜好与活动_我喜欢做

基础⑩·喜好与活动,我想做/需要做,Practice would like/hope/need + to do polite expressions.,练习委婉表达意愿：would like / hope to / need to。,35,L1~L2,掌握would like to和hope to等委婉表达。,委婉 意愿 would like hope to need to,"## 不定式 (Infinitive): to + 动词原形
- want + to do: I want to learn Chinese.
- hope + to do: I hope to see you.
- need + to do: I need to finish this.
## 接不定式的常用动词
## would like 委婉表达
- I would like to order. (比 I want to 更礼貌)
- Would you like to join us? (邀请)",practice_foundation-integrated-express_喜好与活动_我想做需要做
基础⑩·礼貌与请求,请你帮我...,Practice polite requests with Could Would and May I.,练习Could/Would/May I等礼貌请求。,35,L1~L2,掌握Could you / Would you / May I 三种礼貌请求。,礼貌请求 could would may please,"## 三种礼貌请求
## 回答方式
- Could you...? → Sure. / Of course. / Certainly.
- Would you mind...? → Not at all. / Of course not.
- 拒绝时：I'm sorry, but... / I'm afraid I can't.
## 加分表达
- I'd appreciate it if you could...
- I'd be grateful if you would...
- Sorry to bother you, but...",practice_foundation-integrated-express_礼貌与请求_请你帮我

基础⑩·礼貌与请求,你想要...吗？,Practice offering and inviting with Would you like and Do you want.,练习邀请和提议：Would you like / Do you want / How about。,35,L1~L2,掌握邀请和提议的各种表达方式。,邀请 提议 would you like how about,"## 邀请和提议
- Would you like some coffee? (邀请喝茶)
- Do you want to join us? (一般邀请)
- How about going out? (提议)
## 接受邀请
- I'd love to! (很乐意)
- That sounds great! (听起来很棒)
- Count me in! (算我一个)
## 婉拒邀请
- I'm afraid I can't. (恐怕不行)
- Maybe another time. (改天吧)
- Can I take a rain check? (能改日吗？)
## 请客相关
- It's my treat. (我请客)
- Let me get this. (让我来付)
- It's on me. (算我的)",practice_foundation-integrated-express_礼貌与请求_你想要吗
基础⑩·经历与持续,我去过/做过,Practice present perfect with have been/done and ever/never.,练习现在完成时：have been to / have done / ever/never。,40,L1~L2,掌握现在完成时表经历的基本用法。,完成时 have been to ever never 经历,"## 现在完成时 (经历用法)
- I have been to Beijing. (去过 — 现在已经不在那)
- Have you ever tried sushi? (你吃过吗？— 经历)
- I have never seen a ghost. (从未见过 — 零经历)
## 结构
have/has + 过去分词
- I have visited 5 countries.
- She has never been abroad.
## 标志词
- ever (曾经): Have you ever...?
- never (从未): I have never...
- once / twice / several times / so far / lately
## 关键区别
- I went to Beijing last year. (过去具体时间 → 一般过去时)
- I have been to Beijing. (不强调时间 → 现在完成时)",practice_foundation-integrated-express_经历与持续_我去过做过

基础⑩·经历与持续,已经多久了,Practice present perfect with for since already yet just.,练习现在完成时的时间表达：for/since/already/yet/just。,40,L1~L2,掌握for/since/already/yet/just的用法。,完成时 for since already yet just 持续,"## 现在完成时 (持续用法)
- for + 时间段: I have lived here for 3 years.
- since + 时间点: I have studied English since 2020.
## 其他标志词
## for vs since
- for + 长度：for 5 years / for a long time
- since + 起点：since 2020 / since Monday / since I was young
## 常见错误
- ❌ I have lived here since 3 years. → ✅ for 3 years
- ❌ I have lived here for 2020. → ✅ since 2020",practice_foundation-integrated-express_经历与持续_已经多久了
